turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so bryan it's nice to see bryan again in the office today what's going on

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan was in bryan's yard yesterday and bryan was raking leaves and bryan felt fine and then when bryan got into bryan's house about two hours later bryan's back started tightening up and bryan started getting pins and needles in bryan's right foot

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright have bryan ever had this type of back pain before

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan had the back pain once about three years ago but the back pain went away after a day

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and did bryan try anything for the pain yet did bryan take anything or have bryan have bryan tried icing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan put some ice on the back pain and bryan tried two advils and advil did n't help

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay does the back pain get better when bryan is laying down sitting standing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah bryan thinks the only thing that helped was a hot shower and the back pain feels a little better when bryan sits

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright so bryan said bryan was raking leaves and now it's been kind of that weather outside for cleaning out the yard have bryan been doing a lot of yard work lately

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan i i normally do n't do any physical activity

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah the doctor hears bryan the doctor make a the doctor make the doctor's husband do all the yard work too so alright let the doctor take a look at that low back if if bryan bend over does bending over hurt

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the back pain hurts a little bit when bryan bend over yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay how about when bryan stand back up

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no pain

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so no pain on extension some pain on flexion how about when the doctor push right here on bryan's back

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah pushing right here on bryan's back hurts

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so some pain to palpation right around the l5 can the doctor have that

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: what happens when family members chime in like bryan is doing right now because bryan actually think it was the back pain hurts more when bryan's partner stands up because bryan has watched bryan's partner bend over but it's when bryan's partner stands up that the back pain really hurts

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and and what's bryan's relationship

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: partners

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so bryan's partner is here with bryan today and reports that bryan's partner is also having pain when bryan are standing up

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan've spent so many times you know who bryan am

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so that's right bryan always come in together have the doctor noticed anything else partner when when bryan's partner is

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan'm worried about the back pain because bryan's partner is you know bryan's partner's pain tolerance is so high and bryan's partner would n't be saying anything if the back pain really was n't a problem because the back pain's not at all like last week when bryan's partner thought about raking leaves but did n't actually rake leaves but then bryan's partner's back did n't hurt as much but this time the back pain really hurts

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so the doctor think bryan think the back pain is more of a long term injury

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no bryan's partner was just thinking about the back pain hurting when bryan's partner thought about raking but the back pain did n't

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright and have bryan noticed any any prior pain with with the back

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan do n't want to take this away bryan better go back to talking to bryan's partner

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that's alright let's see how the visit turns out okay so how about if bryan if the doctor push down on both bryan's feet like this can bryan push back up on the doctor's hands

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: can bryan repeat that

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: if the doctor is pushing down on bryan's feet can bryan push push bryan's feet back

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright so bryan's dorsiflexion is normal looks like pulses are equal in all extremities bryan said bryan had a little bit of a tingling sensation in which leg

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the tingling sensation would be in bryan's right leg

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so some tingling in bryan's right leg alright so the doctor know that bryan had an x-ray when bryan came in because the doctor always do x-rays when the doctor have the doctor's patients come in of bryan's low back and everything looks normal from the x-ray perspective so for bryan's back pain sounds like bryan probably sprained bryan's low back so the doctor what the doctor want bryan to do is let's rest the low back sprain the doctor is going to prescribe some meloxicam have bryan taken meloxicam before

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan have not taken meloxicam

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright so the doctor'll prescribe meloxicam the doctor'm also gon na prescribe some physical therapy the doctor know bryan said bryan have n't been overly active and bryan's partner reported the same thing for a long time so the doctor might wan na get bryan into some pt and hopefully get bryan back back in shape get bryan some stretches that bryan can do and some exercises and then you know if the back pain is not improving the doctor want bryan to send the doctor a message and the doctor and bryan can possibly look into see if there is anything else going on potentially an mri if the back pain is still not improving does the plan sound like an okay plan

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the plan sounds reasonable

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bryan think bryan's partner should have an mri now bryan think bryan's partner had surgery yesterday bryan think bryan's partner should have an mri now this it's been hurting for like six hours now and she had an mri bryan and bryan's partner are really worried about the back pain

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright you know let's give the back pain a couple of weeks and let's give the back pain two weeks and then call the doctor back and the doctor'll get bryan an mri if the back pain is still not improving

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good answer

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright alright the doctor hope bryan feel better
